About me

Hi, I'm Belle Zerrudo

I'm a web designer based in Cavite, Philippines, passionate about helping businesses grow through strategic and beautiful web design. I believe that a great website is more than just good looks — it's a powerful tool that works for your business around the clock.

I combine a sharp eye for aesthetics with a deep understanding of what makes websites perform — creating digital experiences that not only look stunning but drive real results for my clients, whether they're a local business in Cavite or a brand anywhere in the world.

4+
Services
PH
& Global
✦
Available
Web Design UI/UX Strategic Design Mobile-Friendly E-commerce Worldwide
What I offer

Services built to grow your business

Every website I build is crafted with purpose — designed to attract, engage, and convert your ideal clients.

📄
01

Landing Page

A single, high-impact page designed to capture attention and convert visitors into leads or customers. Perfect for promotions and launches.

✓ Single page, fully responsive
✓ Lead capture form
✓ Mobile optimized
🌐
02

Basic Business Website

A complete, professional website that tells your brand story and helps customers find, trust, and contact you. Ideal for businesses ready to grow online.

✓ 5–8 pages
✓ SEO-ready structure
✓ Mobile responsive
✍️
03

Portfolio / Blog

Showcase your work or share your expertise with a beautifully designed portfolio or blog. Perfect for creatives and thought leaders building their brand.

✓ Gallery or post layout
✓ Simple CMS setup
✓ Clean editorial design
🛒
04

Basic E-commerce

Start selling online with a clean, trustworthy e-commerce website. Built for businesses ready to take their products to the digital market.

✓ Payment gateway (Maya/GCash/PayPal)
✓ 10–20 products
✓ Secure checkout
Start your project ↗
